description: Quality-first profile for high-stakes or shorter sessions. Preserves the same workflow while using stronger specialized models for design, planning, frontend, backend, review, tests, and security.

dispatcher.reason: Cheap foreground routing, approval gates, and Task dispatch.

architect.reason: Design, architecture tradeoffs, and design.md creation.

planner.reason: Implementation planning, file locks, task prompts, and parallel groups.

plan-reviewer.reason: Strict plan validation, task completeness, and parallel-safety review.

builder.reason: Scheduler-only build coordination; does not implement or invoke Task.

reviewer.reason: Review coordination, verification summary, and readiness recommendation.

designer.reason: UI/UX design, layout, flows, accessibility, and ui-spec.md.

frontend-engineer.reason: React, TypeScript, forms, accessibility, frontend state, and tests.

frontend-polisher.reason: High-polish UI, refined interaction behavior, and visual quality.

backend-engineer.reason: APIs, services, workers, validation, integrations, and domain logic.

database-engineer.reason: Schema, migrations, indexes, transactions, and data integrity.

cloud-architect.reason: Cloud, IaC, deployment, IAM, reliability, observability, and rollback safety.

test-engineer.reason: Unit tests, integration tests, regression coverage, fixtures, and verification.

code-reviewer.reason: Read-only correctness, maintainability, performance, and architecture review.

security-auditor.reason: Deep security review for auth, IAM, secrets, PII, and production risk.

high-architect.reason: Premium architecture, reliability, cloud, and security escalation.

high-designer.reason: Premium UX, product, and system-design escalation.
